## Checklist

- [ ] Small focused change
- [ ] Tests added/updated

- [ ] README/docs updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] gofmt checked
- [ ] go test ./... passed

- [ ] coverage did not decrease
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] No lookahead bias introduced
